arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund's Niko Kovač praises "sensationally good" Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Chukwuemeka made his Bundesliga debut as a second-half substitute against Union, the 21-year-old midfielder getting 22 minutes under his belt after a short cameo in Dortmund's UEFA Champions League knockouts play-off first leg win against Sporting Lisbon on 11 February. Borussia Dortmund boss Niko Kovač was full of praise for Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka following a brilliant display in their 6-0 win over Union Berlin on Matchday 23.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Can Chelsea be trusted even against Southampton?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across the Premier League and is tipping four home wins on Tuesday.

arts.sum: Southampton will be without a host of senior players for their trip to the capital

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Southampton.

arts.ttl: PL talking points: Rashford rejuvenated as Chelsea search for respite
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has only started one game for Aston Villa so far - which arrived in the 2-2 draw with Liverpool in the Premier League - but after spearheading the 2-1 comeback victory against Chelsea with two assists for fellow newcomer Marco Asensio, fans should expect to see a lot more of him. Despite a scalp at Old Trafford in December, a run of two wins in 10 games meant that the buzz that once surrounded Brighton's push to break into the established top-six positions was transferred to the likes of Bournemouth and Nottingham Forest who capitalised to find themselves in favourable positions.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea ‘pushing hard’ to sign sporting director – Blues want to offer him major role
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are expected to battle it out for Paris Saint-Germain advisor Luís Campos. That’s at least what Le10 Sport are reporting, and they state Arsenal and Chelsea have had him on their agenda for several months. It’s further claimed both Arsenal and Chelsea have been ‘pushing hard’ to try and sign the Portuguese. The post Arsenal and Chelsea ‘pushing hard’ to sign sporting director – Blues want to offer him major role appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca should copy his Man City academy trick in Chelsea vs Southampton, Cole Palmer will be buzzing if he does - opinion
arts.sum: He doesn't have too many other options.

arts.ttl: UEFA make huge Conference League fixture announcement impacting Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: As a result, UEFA have confirmed that, in the event that Chelsea reach the quarter-final of the Conference League and Tottenham progress to the last eight of the Europa League, then the Blues would see their home and away legs reversed. As things stand, both Chelsea and Tottenham would face home fixtures in the first leg of their quarter-final ties, provided they get past Copenhagen and Alkmaar, respectively.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Guehi makes SURPRISE decision as Maresca issues brutal message
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Marc Guehi and Cole Palmer . Arsenal’s pursuit of RB Leipzig forward Benjamin Sesko could inadvertently deny Chelsea the chance to sign Ipswich Town forward Liam Delap this summer.
